summary: Phase J3 Journey page features fully tested. All 15 backend tests pass (100%). All J3 frontend features verified working: Gmail nudge, Send Profile card, Archive AlertDialog, Notes sidebar with CRUD.
critical_code_review_comments: Coach Watch Alert is MOCKED as always 'Staff Stable' - this is expected per the requirements
seed_data_creation: Created test notes for CRUD testing (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: J3 Journey features complete. Notes CRUD via /api/athlete/programs/{id}/notes (GET/POST) and /api/athlete/notes/{noteId} (PUT/DELETE). Gmail nudge shows when Gmail not connected, links to /settings. Send Profile card shows when school has coaches, opens EmailComposer with pre-filled subject and body. Archive button triggers AlertDialog confirmation. Notes sidebar opens from right edge tab, supports create/pin/edit/delete.

mocked_apis.Coach Watch Alert: Always shows 'Staff Stable' green badge - this is intentionally mocked

notes_crud: POST /api/athlete/programs/{programId}/notes creates note with note_id, content, is_pinned, timestamps
All Notes endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
j1_j2_regression: Programs with coaches have college_coaches array

gmail_nudge_banner: data-testid='gmail-nudge-banner' present when Gmail not connected
send_profile_card: data-testid='send-profile-card' present when school has coaches
EmailComposer pre-filled with subject 'My Recruiting Profile — {school_name}'
EmailComposer body contains profile template text
archive_dialog: Dialog has Cancel and Archive buttons (data-testid='confirm-archive-btn')
notes_sidebar: data-testid='notes-list' displays pinned and recent notes
Note items have pin/edit/delete buttons on hover
'Note saved' toast appears after creating note
j1_j2_regression: Match score badge (70% Match on BYU)
Coaching Staff with Heather Olmstead, Mark Francis

j3_features: Gmail nudge banner visible (Gmail not connected)
